response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  d.cal_dt,
  d.store_id,
  d.tot_sls_amt AS dly_sls_agg_total,
  COALESCE(o.ord_revenue, 0) AS ord_hdr_non_cancelled_total,
  d.tot_sls_amt - COALESCE(o.ord_revenue, 0) AS reconciliation_diff,
  CASE WHEN ABS(d.tot_sls_amt - COALESCE(o.ord_revenue, 0)) < 0.01 THEN 'MATCH' ELSE 'MISMATCH' END AS reconciliation_status
FROM dly_sls_agg d
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    DATE(dd.cal_dt) AS ord_date,
    oh.store_id,
    SUM(oh.tot_amt) AS ord_revenue
  FROM ord_hdr oh
  JOIN date_dim dd ON oh.date_key = dd.date_key
  WHERE oh.sts_cd <> 'X'
  GROUP BY DATE(dd.cal_dt), oh.store_id
) o ON DATE(dd.cal_dt) = o.ord_date AND d.store_id = o.store_id
JOIN date_dim dd ON d.agg_dt_key = dd.date_key
ORDER BY d.cal_dt, d.store_id;",
  "reason": null
}
```
